description: Detects raw union usage in C++ -- prefer std::variant for type-safe tagged unions. Simplified from Rust: flags all union_specifier nodes (info severity) without filtering anonymous unions inside struct/class (idiomatic C++ pattern), extern C unions (C interop), or non-trivial member severity graduation. NOLINT suppression is not supported in the JSON DSL.

flag.message: Raw union detected -- consider using std::variant for type-safe alternatives; unions with non-trivial types (string, vector) cause undefined behavior
